name: bitbucket
description: Bitbucket Cloud connector metadata for repository, pull request, issue, pipeline, deployment, download, webhook, and workspace CLI parity planning.

risk.read: Metadata-only seed; no Bitbucket read execution is enabled in this slice.
risk.write: No Bitbucket writes are enabled in this slice. Future reverse ETL actions must use plan, preview, approval, execute.
risk.approval: Destructive, admin, and sensitive Bitbucket actions remain blocked by default pending policy work.
